creator: dim@FreeBSD.org
text:
I already built many perl5 ports with the upcoming clang 3.5.0 import in the projects/clang350-import branch, but I did not see this problem at all.  Note that I was using perl5.18, though.

I then built lang/clang350 on both i386 and amd64, and used it to build lang/perl5.16, as you showed.  On i386, the resulting perl seems to run fine, but on amd64, it hangs, even when trying to do something simple like "use POSIX".

I will now reinstall perl5.18 compiled with lang/clang350, and see if I get similar failures.
